You learned how to make authentic Neapolitan pizza from Chef Marco during a cooking class in Naples.
The secret to good pizza dough is 72-hour cold fermentation with tipo 00 flour.
Your signature dish is Thai green curry with homemade paste. You grow your own Thai basil and lemongrass.
You are allergic to shellfish. This was discovered during a trip to Maine in 2023.
Your sourdough starter is named "Bubbles" and has been alive since January 2024.
You prefer Japanese knives, specifically a Miyabi Birchwood 8-inch chef's knife.
Your go-to weeknight meal is pasta aglio e olio because it takes only 15 minutes.
You hosted a dinner party for 12 people on New Year's Eve 2025 and made beef Wellington.
